ingredients_text: 55% Meringue (Sugar, Free Range Egg White, Dried Free Range Egg White, Stabiliser: Xanthan Gum; Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid), 22% Lemon Curd (Sugar, Free Range Egg, Cream (Milk), 12% Sicilian Lemon Juice from Concentrate, Maize Flour, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid), 13% Mixed Berry Sauce (Mixed Berries [Black Currants, Red Currants, Blackberries, Blueberries, Raspberries], Sugar, Maize Flour, Gelling Agent: Pectins), 9% Cream (Milk).
